zh.Llanfihangel Tor Y Mynydd, Monmouthshire: 威爾士蒙姆爾利安費韓爾 托 Y 米德
zh.lifeSummary: Paen Hen ap Ioe of Castell Paen是Ioe ap Meirchion of Montgomeryshire的兒子，於0975年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾利安費韓爾 托 Y 米德。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1000年在英國威爾斯享年25歲。

nameMeanings.name: Paen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Penelope  , and sometimes also of   Peninnah .

variants.name: Penelope
meanings: Name borne in Greek mythology by the wife of Odysseus who sat patiently awaiting his return for twenty years, meanwhile, as a supposed widow, fending off by persuasion and guile a pressing horde of suitors for her hand in marriage. Her name would seem to derive from Greek pēnelops ‘duck’, and play is made with this word in the Odyssey. However, this may obscure a more complex origin, now no longer recoverable. The name is recorded in England from the 16th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Hen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ioe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘eye-oh-nee’: 19th-century coinage, apparently with reference to the glories of Ionian Greece in the 5th century bc . No such name exists in classical Greek.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Castell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Roberto, Amarilys, Carlos, Eduardo, Estevan, Francisco, Guadalupe, Humberto, Jorge, Manuel, Mateo, Pablo.
English and Scottish: variant of   Castle  .

Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Asgaill ‘son of Ásketill’, an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’. The Manx surname is cognate with Scottish Gaelic McAskill .

variants.name: Castille
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Antoine, Armand, Maudry, Michel, Monique, Normand, Remy, Renella.
Americanized form of Catalan   Castell  , under the French influence in LA.
French: habitational name from the French name for Castile in Spain (see   Castilla  ).

variants.name: Castle
meanings: English: topographic name from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English castel ‘castle, fortified building or set of buildings’, especially the residence of a feudal lord (from Late Latin castellum, a diminutive of castrum ‘fort, Roman walled city’). The name would also have denoted a servant who lived and worked at such a place, or someone who had an obligation to provide services or rent to a castle.

nameMeanings.name: Paen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Penelope  , and sometimes also of   Peninnah .

variants.name: Penelope
meanings: Name borne in Greek mythology by the wife of Odysseus who sat patiently awaiting his return for twenty years, meanwhile, as a supposed widow, fending off by persuasion and guile a pressing horde of suitors for her hand in marriage. Her name would seem to derive from Greek pēnelops ‘duck’, and play is made with this word in the Odyssey. However, this may obscure a more complex origin, now no longer recoverable. The name is recorded in England from the 16th century onwards.

en.lifeSummary: Paen Hen ap Ioe of Castell Paen was born in 0975, in Llanfihangel Tor Y Mynydd, Monmouthshire, Wales as the son of Ioe ap Meirchion of Montgomeryshire. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1000, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

ja.Llanfihangel Tor Y Mynydd, Monmouthshire: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランフィハンジェル トル イ ムイニーッド
ja.lifeSummary: Paen Hen ap Ioe of Castell Paenは0975年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランフィハンジェル トル イ ムイニーッドでIoe ap Meirchion of Montgomeryshireの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1000年にイギリスウェールズで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Paen Hen ap Ioe of Castell Paen(은)는 0975년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜피핸걸 터 이 마이니드에서 Ioe ap Meirchion of Montgomeryshire의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1000년 영국 웨일스에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.
